species.citation: Lam. , Encycl. (Lamarck) 3 (1792) 417 ; Noot., Fl. Males. ser. 1, 6 (1962) 218. ssp. integrifolia. = Ailanthus blancoi Merr., Sp. Blancoanae (1918) 205; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 348. Distribution: Australia, Bismarck Arch, Borneo, China, Malay Peninsula, Moluccas, New Guinea, Philippines, Solomon Isls, Sulawesi, Sumatra. PALAWAN. Notes: 0-900m. Native.
species.distribution: LUZON: Laguna, MINDANAO: Zamboanga, Zamboanga del Sur, PALAWAN.

species.citation: (Dennst.) Alston , Handb. Fl. Ceylon 6(Suppl.) (1931) 41 ; Noot., Fl. Males. ser. 1, 6 (1962) 219; ≡ Adenanthera triphysa Dennst. , Schlüssel Hortus Malab. (1818) 32. = Ailanthus philippinensis Merr. , Publ. Bur. Sci. Gov. Lab. 35 (1906) 25 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 348. = Hebonga mollis Radlk. , PJS 6c (1911) 367 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 348. = Hebonga obliqua Radlk. , PJS 6c (1911) 366 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 348.

species.citation: (L.) Merr. , J. Arnold Arbor. 9 (1928) 3 ; Noot., Fl. Males. ser. 1, 6 (1962) 211; ≡ Rhus javanica L. , Sp. Pl., 1st Ed. (1753) 265. = Brucea amarissima (Lour.) Merr. , PJS 10c (1915) 18 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 347; ≡ Gonus amarissimus Lour. , Fl. Cochinch. (1790) 658.
species.distribution: Andaman Isls, Australia, Bangladesh, Borneo, Cambodia, China, India, Java, Lesser Sunda Isls, Malay Peninsula, Moluccas, Myanmar, New Guinea, Philippines, Sri Lanka, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Taiwan, Thailand, Vietnam. BASILAN, BILIRAN, BONGAO, CABUCAN, CAMIGUIN, JOLO, LEYTE, LUZON: Albay, Aurora, Mountain Province, Rizal, MINDANAO: Davao de Oro (photos), Misamis, Misamis Oriental (photos), Surigao, Zamboanga, Zamboanga del Norte, NEGROS, PALAWAN, SAMAR.
species.notes: Lowland open sites and light secondary forests and thickets, also on limestone. 0-900m.

species.citation: Wall. ex Kurz , J. Asiat. Soc. Bengal, Pt. 2, Nat. Hist. 42(2) (1873) 64 ; Wall., Cat. (1848) No. 8483; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 347; Noot., Fl. Males. ser. 1, 6 (1962) 212. = Brucea macrobotrys Merr. , PJS 10c (1915) 19 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 347. = Brucea stenophylla Merr. , PJS 12c (1917) 274 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 347.
species.distribution: Cambodia, China, Laos, Myanmar, Philippines, Thailand, Vietnam. BILIRAN, BOHOL, LEYTE, LUZON: Abra, Albay, Apayao, Bataan, Benguet, Cagayan (photos), Camarines Norte, Ifugao, Ilocos Norte, Ilocos Sur, Mountain Province, Nueva Ecija, Pangasinan, Quezon, Rizal, Sorsogon, MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, Zamboanga, Zamboanga del Norte, MINDORO, NEGROS (photos), PALAUI (photos), PALAWAN, PANAY, SAMAR.
species.notes: Open forests, often in damp places. Fl. Jan-Aug. 0-1800m.

species.citation: Jack , Malayan Misc. 2 (1822) 45. ssp. eglandulosa (Merr.) Noot., Fl. Males., 1st Ser. 6 (1962) 206; Romeroso et al., J. Asia-Pacific biodiv. 17 (2024) 13. = Eurycoma eglandulosa Merr., PJS 17 (1920) 266; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 346. Distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. DINAGAT, HOMONHON, MINDANAO: Surigao, Surigao del Norte. Notes: Lowland forests on ultramafics. Native.
